commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content:
But he says, Which have been since the world began. Because all the Scriptures of the Old Testament were aconstant prophecy of Christ. For both our father Adam himself, and the other fathers, by their deeds bore testimony to His dispensation.
But he says, Which have been since the world began. Because all the Scriptures of the Old Testament were aconstant prophecy of Christ. For both our father Adam himself, and the other fathers, by their deeds bore testimony to His dispensation.

commentaries.author: Greek Expositor
commentaries.content: Whereby he means that God spoke through them, and that their speech was not of man.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
